search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Kept results limited to lastzwiki.com as requested. Prioritized concrete guide pages over generic home pages. No result should be treated as proof for player-facing mechanics, costs, rewards, seasons, or events.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Hero hub page with roster, faction filters, equipment section, and character references; useful for hero discovery and cross-checking names or gear categories.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero roster and hero-related page entry points.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table page covering laboratory categories and per-level badge costs; useful for locating research names and cost patterns.
results.primary_user_job: Find research categories and research cost tables.

results.title: Last Z Wiki - Complete English Guide | Strategies, Tier List & Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: English homepage with navigation to heroes, research, alliances, buildings, and strategy articles; good as a discovery gateway but not a mechanic source by itself.
results.primary_user_job: Find the site section for hero or research pages.

search_records.no_results_reason: No matching pages were found within the allowed source domain.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search stayed within lastz.fandom.com. Strongest leads are the daily event page for research/hero event themes and the building pages for research mechanics and speed boosts. One result alone should not be used to confirm player-facing rates, costs, or rewards.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Daily event cycle includes an Age of Science theme for tech research and a Hero Initiative theme for hero upgrades; useful for event discovery and reward cross-checks.
results.primary_user_job: Find which daily event theme covers research or hero materials.
claims_to_verify: Point sources for research and hero actions

results.title: Laboratory | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core research building page; confirms where technologies are researched and that an extra lab can unlock later.
results.primary_user_job: Verify how research is unlocked and performed.

results.title: Bookstore | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Bonus building that increases research speed, relevant for optimization and research-related mechanics.
results.primary_user_job: Check buildings that boost research speed.

search_records.search_notes: Search was restricted to www.packsify.com as required. No matching pages were found for the provided query.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed pages matched the approved-domain query.

search_records.search_notes: Search was restricted to mmediamreza.com as requested. Results emphasize exact Last Z pages rather than the homepage. Generic or off-topic pages were not included.

results.title: Military Center Guide: Maximize Unit Cap & Base Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Military building guide for Last Z with unlock requirement, unit cap effect, and base power role.
results.primary_user_job: Find military center upgrade value and army-cap impact.
claims_to_verify: Unlock level and unit cap effect

results.title: Rider Camp Guide: Train & Promote Rider Units - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Unit-training guide with level table for rider camp costs, cap, speed, and power.
results.primary_user_job: Compare rider camp upgrade costs and training stats.

results.title: How to create farm accoun (Farm Account Guide) - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Alt-account setup guide focused on resource gathering and main-account support.
results.primary_user_job: Learn how to set up a farm alt for resource support.
claims_to_verify: Setup methods and account cloning steps
